description: The file defines the NotesState class which manages application state related to notes. It includes state variables, getters, and methods for fetching, updating, selecting, creating, deleting, and toggling notes, as well as handling draft note editing with autosave functionality.

classes.name: NotesState
classes.description: A class that manages the state of notes in the application, including loading status, error messages, search queries, list of notes, selected note, draft note contents, autosave timer, and change tracking.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Fetches the current list of notes from the repository, applies search filter if necessary, sorts by pinned status, and updates state accordingly.

methods.name: setSearchQuery
methods.description: Updates the search query state and notifies listeners to trigger a refresh.

methods.name: selectNote
methods.description: Selects a note by ID, loads its data into draft fields, resets unsaved change flag, cancels autosave timer, and notifies listeners.

methods.name: newNote
methods.description: Creates a new note with a unique ID, adds it to the repository, sets it as selected, initializes draft fields, and refreshes the notes list.

methods.name: deleteSelected
methods.description: Deletes the currently selected note from the repository, clears selection, resets draft fields, cancels autosave, and refreshes the list.

methods.name: togglePinnedSelected
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of the selected note, refreshes the list, and rehydrates the draft after update.

methods.name: updateDraftTitle
methods.description: Updates the draft title and schedules autosave.

methods.name: updateDraftContent
methods.description: Updates the draft content and schedules autosave.

methods.name: updateDraftTagsFromCsv
methods.description: Parses CSV tags input, updates draft tags, and schedules autosave.

methods.name: saveDraft
methods.description: Persists the current draft note to the repository and updates the note list accordingly.
